description: UC-10 headline case: 'run abc.exe def.exe ghi.exe jkl.exe, pool 3.' The interactive builder infers SHELL dispatch (each token resolves to a runnable command) and wraps every executable via the FR-40 wrap adapter, so the harness tracks each one's heartbeat and reaps it by exit code. Edit the repo path (and the executable paths/args) before running.
